p2p_enrich.notes: CI commands discovered and verified: 1) cargo check -p biome_markdown_parser, 2) cargo clippy -p biome_markdown_parser --all-features --all-targets -- --deny warnings, 3) cargo test -p biome_markdown_parser, 4) cargo test -p biome_markdown_parser --test spec_test, 5) cargo test -p biome_markdown_parser --test list_tightness, 6) cargo fmt --all -- --check. Added 4 new pass_to_pass tests: test_repo_markdown_parser_clippy, test_repo_markdown_parser_all_tests, test_repo_format_check, test_repo_markdown_list_tightness. Removed 3 tests that caused disk space issues: test_repo_markdown_formatter_tests, test_repo_related_markdown_crates_check, test_repo_markdown_commonmark_conformance. All 6 p2p tests verified passing on base commit b22f31afd5e0d40cf5a2b10dad85accf7d34a2b8.

validate.notes: Fixed unicode escape sequences in Rust test code. Added cargo fmt after writing test file. Gold test passes. NOP test shows reward=1 because the multibyte panic bug doesn't manifest as test failure.
